---
&lt;p&gt;Core Requirements&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;ul class="simple"&gt;
&lt;li&gt;3–5 years of professional experience in data engineering or a closely related discipline&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;li&gt;Proven experience building and maintaining automated data collection pipelines from web-based public sources using Python (Scrapy, BeautifulSoup, Playwright, or Selenium)&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;li&gt;Strong data cleaning and normalization skills, with demonstrated ability to handle heterogeneous, inconsistent real-world datasets&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;li&gt;Solid PostgreSQL experience: schema design, query optimization, and database maintenance&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;li&gt;Hands-on AWS experience: Lambda, EC2, S3, RDS&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;li&gt;Experience scheduling and orchestrating data pipelines (Apache Airflow, AWS EventBridge, or equivalent)&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;li&gt;Experience navigating the constraints of large-scale public data collection, including reliability, access patterns, and data freshness challenges&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;/ul&gt;
&lt;p&gt;Nice to Have&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;ul class="simple"&gt;
&lt;li&gt;Knowledge of data quality frameworks and validation pipeline design&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;li&gt;Experience with containerization (Docker) and infrastructure-as-code (Terraform, AWS CDK)&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;li&gt;Familiarity with ETL/ELT tooling (dbt, AWS Glue, or equivalent)&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;li&gt;Exposure to art market platforms (Christie's, Sotheby's, Artsy, Artnet) or understanding of how auction and gallery data is structured&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;li&gt;Background or genuine interest in the art world, collectibles, or alternative asset markets&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;li&gt;Experience in a startup or early-stage environment where ownership and adaptability are essential&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;/ul&gt;
</description><guid>https://www.python.org/jobs/8097/</guid></item><item><title>Senior Data Engineer (100% Remote - USA Only), Six Feet Up</title><link>https://www.python.org/jobs/8095/</link><description>100% Remote, USA
&lt;p&gt;Six Feet Up is seeking a Senior Data Engineer with deep experience designing, building, and maintaining secure, scalable data systems.&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;p&gt;In this role, you will work with cross-functional teams to turn complex data challenges into reliable production solutions. You will design data pipelines, build processing workflows, improve data quality, support machine learning initiatives, and help clients make better use of structured, unstructured, time-series, sensor-based, and high-volume data.&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;p&gt;We are looking for someone who can bring technical leadership, sound engineering judgment, and strong communication skills to ambiguous data problems. The ideal candidate is comfortable working across data engineering, cloud infrastructure, machine learning support, and production software delivery.&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;p&gt;As a Senior Data Engineer, you will:&lt;/p&gt;
&lt;ul class="simple"&gt;
&lt;li&gt;Design, build, and maintain robust, scalable data pipelines&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;li&gt;Develop ETL/ELT workflows for collecting, transforming, validating, and storing data&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;li&gt;Work with cloud-based data processing and storage systems&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;li&gt;Implement data validation, quality checks, monitoring, and transformation workflows&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;li&gt;Process complex datasets, including noisy, high-volume, time-series, sensor, or device-generated data&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;li&gt;Support machine learning workflows, including data preparation, model training, evaluation, and production integration&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;li&gt;Collaborate with data scientists, researchers, software engineers, and client stakeholders&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;li&gt;Translate prototype data workflows into reliable, maintainable production systems&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;li&gt;Create systems that are well-documented, testable, secure, and ready for audit or review&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;li&gt;Communicate technical tradeoffs clearly to both technical and non-technical audiences&lt;/li&gt;
&lt;/ul&gt;
&lt;p&gt;If you are a motivated Senior Data Engineer seeking a challenging and meaningful role, we encourage you to apply.&lt;/p&gt;
